en.value: 1.1.1 Organise poor and marginalised families in farmers’ groups1.1.2 Conduct training on various aspects of crop production and marketing (nursery mgt, production/plantation, and IPM, post-harvest handling and marketing, conservation farming, etc)1.1.3 Support families with different production inputs (seeds, IPM materials, breeding bucks, fruit saplings, fodder and forages etc)1.1.4 Construction and renovation of collection centers/marketing sheds1.1.5 Organise market exposure visit to the producers1.1.6 Support Producers, SMEs and collection centers with grading, packaging and branding materials1.1.7 Support disaster affected families with CVA and FSL initiatives1.2.1 Support farmers with required production inputs on conservation farming1.2.2 Support farmers for the demonstration and promotion of polyhouse production1.2.3 Support farmers for water efficient irrigation system (drips, water harvesting ponds, solar pumps etc)1.2.4 Training and business startup support to the youths on Green jobs and other Enterprises1.2.5 Organise awareness raising events on climate change and green jobs1.2.6 Reinforce existing youth-led campaigns on climate justice at community, municipality, provinces and federal level (Including training, events, support on planning on DPRP/LDCRP etc...)2.1.1 Capacitate local governments and wards to undertake eligibility mapping, to conduct registration camps, open bank accounts and build awareness on social protection schemes (registration process, banking payments, renewal process) through different means of communication.2.1.2 Support social protection eligible people from 9 local governments who are from the deprived and most marginalized community to access the schemes (documentation, transportation etc.)2.1.3 Conduct disability screening campaigns in municipalities2.1.4 Support local government to conduct activities that promote transparency and accountability of social protection
